name: Spider-Man (Classic)
bio: Peter Parker, a nerdy scientist, leads a secret double life as the Amazing Spider-Man! Swinging through the streets on his webs, he tackles the most despicable criminals of New York City with his spectacular strength, acrobatic skills, and Spidey Sense.
mechanics: Spider-Man swings back into the Contest with a brand new set of abilities! He can now actually web up his Opponent with stacks of Webbing Passive applied on his Sp1. As the stacks of Webbing increase, corresponding Debuffs are applied to the Opponent.

strengths.title: Opponent Special Control
strengths.description: No one Taunts like Spider-Man! With his constant application of Taunt and Suppression, Spider-Man rarely has to worry about his Opponent's Special 3.

strengths.title: Sustainability
strengths.description: Stacking all of those Taunts massively reduces the Opponent's Attack Rating, meaning Spider-Man can really take the hits!

strengths.title: Counters Evade and Unstoppable
strengths.description: Spidey's Webs do a great job ensuring that his Opponents don't move around too much.

weaknesses.title: Long Special Attacks
weaknesses.description: Since each attack in a Special Attack counts as an 'attack,' Opponents with many hits in their Specials can more quickly chew through Spider-Man's Webbing.

weaknesses.title: Purify
weaknesses.description: Like many Science Champions, Spider-Man depends heavily on Debuffs to fuel his abilities.

abilities.alwaysActive: Spider-Man's Basic Attacks have a 25% chance to inflict a Taunt Debuff for 7 seconds. Spider-Man has a 2% chance to Evade attacks for each Taunt effect on the Opponent.

special1.name: Web-Slinger
special1.description: Each web-shooter attack applies 1 stack of Webbing to the Opponent.

special2.name: Swingin'
special2.description: This attack inflicts a Stun Debuff on the Opponent for 3 seconds. While this Stun is active, the Opponent's Physical Resistance is lowered.

signature.name: Spider-Sense
signature.description: Increased agility coupled with a sixth sense for imminent danger grants a 27.95% chance to Evade attacks.

synergies.name: You're Like Me!
synergies.effect: #Spider-Verse Heroes: Gain a 10% chance to Evade.

synergies.name: The Way Of The Spider
synergies.effect: Spider-Man can use Perfect-Timing while performing a Well-Timed Block to inflict a Physical Vulnerability Debuff.

masteries.name: Inequity
masteries.description: Since Spider-Man applies so many Taunt Debuffs, the additional Attack Rating reduction makes him even safer.

masteries.name: Despair
masteries.description: With all the Debuffs on them, Despair ensures Opponents aren't Healing off of Willpower.
